title: Home Page

sub_fields.label: Background video URL (CDN / Cloudflare Stream)
sub_fields.name: hero_video_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Direct MP4/WebM URL (e.g. Cloudflare Stream …/downloads/default.mp4). Front-end prefers this over the media library field when set.

sub_fields.label: Background video URL (mobile, CDN / Stream)
sub_fields.name: hero_video_mobile_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Direct video file URL for small screens.

sub_fields.label: Video URL (CDN / Cloudflare Stream)
sub_fields.name: video_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Direct MP4/WebM URL; front-end uses this when set instead of the uploaded file.

sub_fields.label: CTA link
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: Internal path or full URL for the studio button.

sub_fields.label: CTA button text
sub_fields.name: button_text
sub_fields.instructions: Label shown on the studio card button.

sub_fields.label: Video URL (CDN / Cloudflare Stream)
sub_fields.name: genai_video_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Direct MP4/WebM URL; front-end uses this when set instead of the uploaded file.

fields.label: Our Work Section Title Override
fields.name: our_work_title
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use default. Work items come from Our Work page / Portfolios.

fields.label: Selected Blogs
fields.name: home_blogs_selected_posts
fields.instructions: Select which blogs to show on the home page. Leave empty to show all/latest blogs. If no blogs exist, frontend uses hardcoded default.

fields.label: Blog / Insight Cards (manual)
fields.name: home_blogs
fields.instructions: Optional: add cards manually. If Selected Blogs above has items, these are used as per-card overrides (category, title, description, image, link, button) at the same index.

sub_fields.label: Button Text
sub_fields.name: button_text
sub_fields.instructions: CTA button label. Leave empty to hide the button.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: URL for the CTA button. Leave empty to use the blog post link.

description: Fields for the Home / Front page. Used by Next.js front-end via WPGraphQL.
